allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.databases WHERE name = 'FinanceStockDatabase'" -C)
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d "FinanceStockDatabase" -Q "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE='BASE TABLE' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME" -C)
Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -d "FinanceStockDatabase" -Q "SELECT Id, StockSectorName, SectorPE FROM StockSectors" -C)
